name: testWaitScopeGetMessageBits
title: testWaitScopeGetMessageBits
syntax: long testWaitScopeGetMessageBits(message msg, ScopeAnalysisSetup setup, dword arraySize, scopeBitData signalData1[], scopeBitData signalData2[], scopeBitData signalData3[]);
description: A CAN message stored in the scope buffer will be parsed. For each bit of the message the signal voltage levels, the bit length, and the bit type will be returned.

parameters.name: msg
parameters.description: The message the bits are fetched.
